$entry..validate:
newData.hasChildren(['nickname','game','xp','timestamp'])
          && newData.child('nickname').isString()
          && newData.child('nickname').val().length <= 30
          && newData.child('game').isString()
          && newData.child('xp').isNumber()
          && newData.child('xp').val() >= 0
          && newData.child('xp').val() <= 999999
          && newData.child('timestamp').isNumber()
